   method: 'GET',

 })

-  path: '/api/cli/upload-url',
+  path: ApiRoutes.cliUploadUrl,
   method: 'POST',
   handler: cliUploadUrlHttp,
 })

-  path: '/api/cli/publish',

+  download: '/api/download',
+  search: '/api/search',
+  skill: '/api/skill',
+  skillResolve: '/api/skill/resolve',
+  cliWhoami: '/api/cli/whoami',
